🤘 ROTATE TO LANDSCAPE 🤘
SPAWN OF EVIL

🤘 HOW TO PLAY 🤘

  • CLICK anywhere on a band member to catch them with the sticky hand
  • You have 2 seconds to drag them to their instrument on stage
  • Drop them over the glowing circle at their instrument
  • Catching a wrong character — they're held for 3 seconds, then automatically released
  • You can only hold one character at a time
  • Place all 5 band members to complete the show!
Moti → Vocals
Alex → Bass Guitar
Nero → Guitar
Miko → Guitar
Yaron → Drums
THE BAND IS SET!
🤘 SPAWN OF EVIL TAKES THE STAGE 🤘
You can hear more here: Spawn of Evil
